name: circuits__qft
title: Quantum Fourier Transform (QFT) — complete example.
stdout:
Quantum Fourier Transform — 3 qubits
 Input state: |5⟩ = |101⟩

 Results (top 8):
   |001⟩   13.0%
   |111⟩   12.8%
   |100⟩   12.7%
   |011⟩   12.6%
   |110⟩   12.5%
   |010⟩   12.3%
   |000⟩   12.2%
   |101⟩   11.8%

 Ideal: each basis state has probability 12.50%
 (QFT of |j⟩ produces equal-amplitude superposition with phase encoding)

  ✓ Run complete.
warnings: DeprecationWarning: qft_circuit(circuit, ...) (in-place form) is deprecated and will be removed in a future release. Use the fragment form `qft_circuit(n_qubits, ...) -> Circuit` and merge with `circuit.add_circuit(fragment)`. (qft.py:51)
